title: Good Night,mare
description:
Every night, a little girl is haunted by terrifying nightmares.

Become Mo, a mythical creature that feeds on bad dreams, and munch the nightmares to bring her smile back! 

Key Features• Dreamlike Atmosphere: Experience a dreamy illustration of hand-painted visuals.

• Casual Gameplay: A runner-action game that's easy to pick up, using just two keys.

• Nightmares vs. Sweet Dreams: Munch only on the nightmares—be careful not to touch her sweet dreams!

• Two Different Mornings: The girl will awaken to one of two different endings, shaped by how you play.

Who is Mo?Mo(Baku) is a mythical creature from East Asian folklore. Said to feed on nightmares, Mo protects people by devouring their bad dreams so they can sleep peacefully.
description_short: A bite-sized casual runner-action game. Become Mo, a fantasy creature. Dodge sweet dreams and munch only on nightmares as you run.
